nodes.documentation:
Logging-only HTLC (32-byte CID-digest style).
 * - No ETH transfers
- No withdraw/refund lifecycle
- 32-byte preimage digest is committed via sha256 (hashlock)
- timelock used as a "valid-after/valid-until" metadata field (creation sanity check)
- verifiable message logging (receiver can verify message preimage against messageHash)
nodes.name: HashedTimelockLog

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "timelock time must be in the future"
